subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf, sister of this Wronged One! Thou wast not with Us in this Cause, nor in the days of the manifestation of this Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و ورقتی اخت این مظلوم در این امر با ما نبوده و در ایام ظهور این مظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @suffering and imprisonment
